parameters.name: get_report
parameters.description: Run a GA4 analytics report. Parameters: property_id (required), date_from (YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (YYYY-MM-DD, required), metrics (comma-separated, default: sessions,activeUsers,screenPageViews), dimensions (comma-separated, optional, e.g. date,country)

parameters.name: list_properties
parameters.description: List all GA4 properties accessible to the user.

parameters.name: get_realtime_data
parameters.description: Get realtime analytics data. Parameters: property_id (required), metrics (comma-separated, default: activeUsers,screenPageViews)
